ham.subject: Out of Office: Alex Martinez – Returning 15 April
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Thank you for your email. I am currently out of the office on vacation and will return on Monday, 15 April 2024. During this period, I will have limited access to email.

If you need immediate assistance, please contact my colleague Maria Thompson at maria.thompson@example.com or call the main office line at (555) 123‑4567.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
Alex Martinez
Finance Manager

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice Payment Required – Action Needed Immediately
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

QuickBooks has detected an outstanding invoice on your account. The total due is $125.00, and payment is required within 24 hours to avoid suspension of your services.

To review the invoice and complete payment, please click the secure link below:

<URL>

If you do not act within the specified time frame, your QuickBooks account will be temporarily suspended, and you may lose access to critical financial data. We strongly recommend that you verify the transaction details and settle the balance promptly.

For any questions, contact QuickBooks Support at <URL> or call 1‑800‑555‑1234. Please do not reply to this email.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
QuickBooks Billing Team
